summary: Underwhelming show – a brief 3:38 “Love Light” disappoints listeners and offers little insight into recording quality.
review: The sole reviewer laments that the performance of "Love Light" is only 3:38 long, noting it could have stretched to a half‑hour jam. No comments are made about the audio source or mix, leaving the technical side unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review, negative about the performance and no recording details; rating reflects a poor show with unclear audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments on sound clarity, mix, or source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Insufficient information; only a complaint about the short length of Love Light.
